scenarios.notes: First skill run returned github results (fabricated?). Second run failed unsafe-python. Final reply was error message. routing_decided + skill_run_spawned emitted. search_actions attractor: NOT present — LLM used skill__mcp_search directly (NEW-1+2 fix confirmed).
must_emit_any satisfied via chat_turn_completed_inline. Context contaminated by S1 history bleed. LLM replied inline about MCP limitations. No search_actions attractor observed.

routing_decided emitted (outcome=error). LLM attempted invoke_action on agent.peer__researcher but args validation failed (args serialized as string not object). Reply: encountered error, no actionable guidance.

routing_decided emitted for researcher (success). Results returned. Writer not routed — LLM said writer action name not visible. Second turn inline only. Reply not empty but writer delegation not completed.
must_emit empty (satisfied). Reply did not mention /a2a/tasks/{run_id} endpoint or message/send JSON-RPC method. LLM explained it can't launch reyn web without specific protocol details.
routing_decided and skill_run_spawned both missing (both must_emit). LLM replied 'no capability' inline without attempting mcp_install skill dispatch.
routing_decided missing (must_emit). LLM called list_actions(category=['mcp.server']) — wrong category. Replied 'no tool found.' No explanation of reyn.yaml cron config.

key_findings.history_bleed_between_scenarios: S1-S4 contaminated; S5-S7 clean after adding history.jsonl to wipe
key_findings.args_double_serialization: LLM serialized args as JSON string in S3 (invalid_args error)
key_findings.writer_agent_not_seeded: agent.peer__writer alias not visible; only researcher was seeded
